title: Assist in preparing for shearing and crutching
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist in preparing for shearing and crutching demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare equipment

pcs.text: Inspect the facilities with the owner or Wool Classer or supervisor to determine the degree of preparation required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect the facilities with the owner or Wool Classer or supervisor to determine the degree of preparation required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect the facilities with the owner or Wool Classer or supervisor to determine the degree of preparation required.

pcs.text: Clean facilities and equipment as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean facilities and equipment as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean facilities and equipment as directed.

pcs.text: Identify contaminating substances, remove and dispose of according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify contaminating substances, remove and dispose of according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify contaminating substances, remove and dispose of according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report equipment faults or malfunctions to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report equipment faults or malfunctions to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report equipment faults or malfunctions to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare equipment

elements.title: Arrange equipment and materials

pcs.text: Position equipment according to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position equipment according to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position equipment according to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor requirements.

pcs.text: Arrange bins and wool packs and any other equipment required as per workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange bins and wool packs and any other equipment required as per workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange bins and wool packs and any other equipment required as per workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Position brooms and scrapers where required for efficiency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position brooms and scrapers where required for efficiency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position brooms and scrapers where required for efficiency.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Arrange equipment and materials

elements.title: Identify hazards

pcs.text: Identify potential and existing hazards and report to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential and existing hazards and report to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential and existing hazards and report to owner or Wool Classer or supervisor.

pcs.text: Follow directions of owner or Wool Classer or supervisor in eliminating work health and safety (WHS) hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow directions of owner or Wool Classer or supervisor in eliminating work health and safety (WHS) hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow directions of owner or Wool Classer or supervisor in eliminating work health and safety (WHS) hazards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify hazards

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
